name: assemblyai
description: Submit audio URLs for transcription and retrieve transcripts via the AssemblyAI API

envVars.name: ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY
envVars.description: AssemblyAI API key from the dashboard

tools.name: Submit Transcript
tools.description: Submit an audio or video URL for transcription (processing is asynchronous)

audio_url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the audio or video file to transcribe

language_code.description: Language of the audio, e.g. en_us or es

tools.name: Get Transcript
tools.description: Get the status and text of a transcript by ID

transcript_id.description: ID of the transcript to fetch

tools.name: List Transcripts
tools.description: List transcripts created by the account

status.description: Filter by status: queued, processing, completed, or error

created_on.description: Only transcripts created on this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

before_id.description: Return transcripts created before this transcript ID (pagination)

historicalSummary.omitted: resource URLs, errors, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Delete Transcript
tools.description: Permanently delete a transcript and its data

transcript_id.description: ID of the transcript to delete

prompts.title: Transcribe an audio URL
prompts.prompt: Submit this audio file to AssemblyAI, wait for it to finish, and give me the transcript: <paste URL>

prompts.title: Review recent transcripts
prompts.prompt: List my recent AssemblyAI transcripts and summarize their statuses.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: AssemblyAI API Setup

steps.title: Create an AssemblyAI account
steps.description: Go to https://www.assemblyai.com/app and sign up. New accounts include free transcription credits for testing.

steps.title: Copy your API key
steps.description: Your API key is shown on the dashboard home page after signing in. You can rotate it from account settings if needed.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add the key to your .env file as ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Transcripts tool to confirm the key works, then submit a sample file such as https://assembly.ai/wildfires.mp3

notes: Authentication sends the raw API key in the Authorization header — no Bearer prefix
Transcription is asynchronous: Submit Transcript returns an id with status 'queued'; poll Get Transcript until status is 'completed'
Transcription is billed per hour of audio once free credits are exhausted; EU data residency uses api.eu.assemblyai.com instead
